metadata.title: Data Lake Platform - Sources
metadata.description: Primary sources for lakehouse architecture, ingestion/CDC, open table formats, governance/lineage, and production operations

architecture_and_modeling.name: Data Mesh Principles (Martin Fowler)
architecture_and_modeling.description: Data mesh concepts: domain ownership, data products, federated governance

architecture_and_modeling.name: Medallion Architecture (Databricks)
architecture_and_modeling.description: Bronze/Silver/Gold layering concept (use as a pattern reference; vendor framing)

architecture_and_modeling.name: Dimensional Modeling Techniques (Kimball Group)
architecture_and_modeling.description: Dimensional modeling reference for BI-ready data products

open_table_formats.name: Apache XTable (Incubating)
open_table_formats.description: Cross-format interoperability between Iceberg, Delta Lake, and Hudi (co-launched by Microsoft, Google, Onehouse)

open_table_formats.name: Apache Iceberg Specification
open_table_formats.description: Iceberg table format specification (snapshots, manifests, partitioning)

open_table_formats.name: Iceberg REST Catalog (within Iceberg spec)
open_table_formats.description: REST catalog API for Iceberg; search within the spec for catalog/REST sections

open_table_formats.name: Project Nessie
open_table_formats.description: Catalog with Git-like branching for data (often used with Iceberg)

open_table_formats.name: Delta Lake Protocol
open_table_formats.description: Delta transaction log protocol (primary source for interoperability)

open_table_formats.name: Apache Hudi Documentation
open_table_formats.description: Hudi table format docs (CDC/upserts, indexing, compaction)

file_formats.name: Apache Arrow Documentation
file_formats.description: Arrow in-memory format and ecosystem (useful for interchange and performance)

ingestion_cdc_streaming.name: dlt Documentation
ingestion_cdc_streaming.description: dlt ingestion framework documentation (incremental loads, schema evolution patterns)

ingestion_cdc_streaming.name: Apache Kafka Documentation
ingestion_cdc_streaming.description: Kafka fundamentals (topics, partitions, retention, consumer groups)

ingestion_cdc_streaming.name: Apache Flink Documentation
ingestion_cdc_streaming.description: Stream processing concepts and architecture entry point

ingestion_cdc_streaming.name: Spark Structured Streaming Programming Guide
ingestion_cdc_streaming.description: Structured Streaming guide (exactly-once semantics, checkpoints, sinks)

transformation_and_quality.name: SQLMesh vs dbt Benchmark (Tobiko/Databricks)
transformation_and_quality.description: 2025 benchmark blog comparing SQLMesh and dbt (treat as one data point; validate against your workload)

transformation_and_quality.name: dbt Documentation
transformation_and_quality.description: dbt docs (models, tests, exposures, semantic layer)

transformation_and_quality.name: dbt Semantic Layer
transformation_and_quality.description: dbt semantic layer for metrics definitions and LLM-based querying

governance_lineage.name: OpenLineage Documentation
governance_lineage.description: Open lineage spec and integrations (lineage events, jobs, runs, datasets)

governance_lineage.name: DataHub Documentation
governance_lineage.description: Metadata platform docs (catalog, lineage, governance workflows)

governance_lineage.name: Apache Ranger Documentation
governance_lineage.description: Centralized authorization and auditing for Hadoop/lake ecosystems

query_engines.name: Trino Documentation
query_engines.description: Trino query engine documentation (architecture, connectors, tuning)

query_engines.name: Trino Iceberg Connector
query_engines.description: How to query Iceberg tables from Trino (catalogs, maintenance, performance)

query_engines.name: Spark SQL, DataFrames and Datasets Guide
query_engines.description: Spark SQL reference for transformations and lakehouse workloads

query_engines.name: ClickHouse Query Optimization Guide
query_engines.description: Definitive 2026 guide: ORDER BY design, join reordering, lazy materialization

query_engines.name: ClickHouse 2025 Features
query_engines.description: 2025 feature highlights: vector search, full-text search, data lake integration

data_observability.name: Monte Carlo Data Observability
data_observability.description: Enterprise data observability platform (freshness, volume, schema, distribution)

data_observability.name: Datafold
data_observability.description: Data diffing and CI/CD integration for data quality

data_observability.name: Soda Data Quality
data_observability.description: Data quality checks and contracts platform

format_comparisons.name: Iceberg vs Delta vs Hudi Comparison (LakeFS)
format_comparisons.description: Comprehensive 2025 comparison of open table formats with Hudi Iceberg support

format_comparisons.name: Data Lakehouse Guide 2025-2026
format_comparisons.description: Comprehensive lakehouse ecosystem guide covering all major tools

optional_ai.name: Automated anomaly detection for data quality (Optional)
optional_ai.description: Optional automation layer for anomaly detection (requires explicit rules and human review)
